allow: Bash(echo "=== project root ==="; find "C:/Users/user/cent" -maxdepth 2 -type f \\\( -iname "*.png" -o -iname "*.jpg" -o -iname "*.jpeg" -o -iname "*.svg" -o -iname "*.webp" -o -iname "*.heic" -o -iname "*.mp4" \\\) -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -not -path "*/.next/*" 2>/dev/null; echo "=== Downloads \(recent images\) ==="; find "C:/Users/user/Downloads" -maxdepth 1 -type f \\\( -iname "*.png" -o -iname "*.jpg" -o -iname "*.jpeg" -o -iname "*.svg" -o -iname "*.webp" -o -iname "*.heic" \\\) -mtime -2 2>/dev/null | head -30; echo "=== Desktop \(recent images\) ==="; find "C:/Users/user/Desktop" -maxdepth 2 -type f \\\( -iname "*.png" -o -iname "*.jpg" -o -iname "*.jpeg" -o -iname "*.svg" -o -iname "*.webp" -o -iname "*.heic" \\\) -mtime -2 2>/dev/null | head -30)
Bash(cp "lady talking at eye evel.PNG" public/assets/product/eye-level.png)
Bash(cp "lady sitting at desk in wheel chair.PNG" public/assets/product/at-home.png)

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $still = Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($still\) { "Remaining node: $\($still.Id\)" } else { "All node processes stopped" }; $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "Port 3000 still held" } else { "Port 3000 free" })
